messaging_analysis.buy_crypto_framing: direct — explicit calls to 'start your crypto journey' and 'trade Bitcoin' position crypto buying as the primary action
messaging_analysis.fees_messaging: Fees are completely absent from all ad copy. Focus is on entry points and simplicity, not cost structure.
messaging_analysis.simplicity_messaging: Emphasized through 'Simplify Bitcoin' messaging and 'no lockups, no setup' language for earning products. Positioned as removing friction from crypto.
messaging_analysis.security_messaging: Entirely absent. No trust, safety, or security language appears in any of these ads.
messaging_analysis.dominant_format: video — 5 of 7 ads are video format, with 2 carousels
longest_running_themes: Start your crypto journey / Trade Bitcoin and Ethereum (84-95 days)
USDC passive earning with no setup (95 days)
messaging_analysis.summary: Competitors lead with beginner-focused onboarding messaging ('start your journey', 'simplify Bitcoin') and direct calls to trade crypto, using video as the primary format. Longest-running ads emphasize frictionless entry and passive earning opportunities, while completely avoiding fee discussion and security positioning.
